title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies:
Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies!
